---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or new capability for Synthelion
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Use case

What are you trying to do? What's the actual scenario this would help with?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like Synthelion to do. If you have an idea of where it
would fit (a new compressor in `synthelion/compressors/`, a new MCP tool, a
new framework adapter, etc.), mention it — not required.

## Alternatives considered

Any workarounds you're using today, or other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context

Links, examples from other projects, or anything else relevant.
